description: SBOM Drift capability pack manifest binding for Pack Runtime route gates, frontend sync, dependency snapshot drift reports, CycloneDX export, CI gate planning, govulncheck command previews, evidence export, and lightweight SDK import discovery.
principles: Expose dependency snapshot collection, drift diffing, CycloneDX JSON export, CI gate planning, govulncheck plan previews, risk summaries, and JSON evidence export as an optional Pack Runtime capability instead of a hard-coded main-shell feature.
Keep SBOM Drift method/path gates, frontend menu/route sync, and SDK import metadata in the pack manifest.
Let external projects import yunque-client/sbom-drift only when the SBOM Drift pack is installed and enabled.
